single_primary_change_description: Apply a fixed, non-tunable cross-sectional volatility discount to D0 raw model scores so that capital deployment is penalized in high-volatility states without altering the confirmed5 feature list or LightGBM hyperparameters.
promotion_criteria: model-layer diagnostics must not show material deterioration versus confirmed5
same-contract portfolio comparison must exceed baseline multi_equal_weight_v1
total equity must be reported in the comparison package
invested capital must be reported in the comparison package
average invested_weight must be reported in the comparison package
average cash_weight must be reported in the comparison package
terminal exit flags must be complete for all repaired terminal rows used by the comparison
failure_criteria: any attempt to improve results by modifying confirmed5 instead of launching a new challenger
any attempt to use validation readout to repeatedly rewrite the transformation rule
same-contract portfolio comparison does not beat baseline
required total equity or invested capital reporting is missing
source mapping remains unresolved at training authorization time
training_fail_fast_conditions: source mapping not confirmed -> cannot train
baseline comparison not bound -> cannot train
manifest validator not passed -> cannot train
